name: Stretch Reminder — Morning
description: Morning stretch reminder sent to Shameen via Telegram after trading session

name: Stretch Reminder — Midday
description: Backup stretch reminder if morning was missed

name: FFE Scout — Daily Research
description: Finds 5 new hospitality vendors, logs to Monday.com, posts to #vendor-scout

name: Crypto Signal Alert
description: Scans XRP, BTC, SOL for significant news. Posts to Discord if signal crosses threshold.

name: Nightly Session Journal
description: Writes daily journal to memory files, posts summary to #ava-journal on Discord

name: Weekly Memory Distill
description: Reviews past 7 days of journals, updates MEMORY.md and facts files, posts summary

name: FFE Auditor — Business Hours
description: Scans HI email for vendor quotes, uploads to Drive, triggers Analyst report

name: FFE Auditor — Morning Catch-Up
description: Catches any overnight vendor emails before business hours start

name: FFE Auditor — Weekend Scan
description: Weekend email scan for any vendor responses that came in

name: FFE EOD Summary
description: End of day summary of all sourcing activity, posted to #mission-control

name: System Health Check
description: Checks gateway health, disk space, cron status, alerts if anything is off
